title: phyllostegia macrophylla
intro: Phyllostegia macrophylla, also known as tree phyllostegia or giant phyllostegia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phyllostegia macrophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
